subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-10-17 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I wish you to study the works of the Blessed Beauty and to live according to His teaching.
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @words vs deeds, @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @nearness to God
